Package de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.solvertypes

Class SolverTypes

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.solvertypes.SolverTypes
public final class SolverTypes extends Object
Facade for the management of SolverType. This class holds references to common and known solver type instances.

To add a new solver type, use the service loader with the SolverType interface.

    Z3_CE_SOLVER

  • Field Details

    • Z3_CE_SOLVER

      public static final SolverType Z3_CE_SOLVER
      Z3 counterexample solver.

  • Method Details

    • getSolverTypes

      @Nonnull public static Collection<SolverType> getSolverTypes()
      Loads and returns the available solver types using the SolverPropertiesLoader. The returned SolverType objects don't change (singletons).
      Returns:
      the available solver types, including legacy solvers

    • getLegacySolvers

      @Nonnull public static Collection<SolverType> getLegacySolvers()
      Returns the available legacy solver types according to the SolverPropertiesLoader.
      Returns:
      the available legacy solver types
